title: 403 Forbidden errors due to Cloudflare settings
symptom: Users encounter 403 Forbidden errors when trying to access workflows or invite users in n8n, despite being the owner of the instance.
applies_when: Using n8n with Cloudflare as a DNS provider
not_this_if: 403 errors not related to security rules
root_cause: Cloudflare's security features can block legitimate requests to n8n, especially if certain rules are set too strictly. This can prevent users from accessing workflows or performing actions like inviting users.
fix_steps: Log in to your Cloudflare account
Create a custom WAF rule to skip actions like 'Managed Challenge', 'JS Challenge', and 'Browser Integrity Check' for your n8n domain and specific request paths.
agent_instruction: Adjust Cloudflare security settings to allow n8n requests.
